name: adiom-plugins
description: Adiom data tools and skills marketplace

plugins.name: dsync-runner
plugins.description: Run database migrations with dsync (open source) or dsynct (enterprise) with CDC support

plugins.name: dsync-sqlbatch-mapping
plugins.description: Generate SQLBatch dsync YAML configuration for SQL to NoSQL data sync with CDC support

plugins.name: self-improve
plugins.description: Reflect on session learnings and contribute skill improvements via PRs

plugins.name: document-project
plugins.description: Create or update product and technical documentation (AGENTS.md, PRD, technical docs, invariants) for a GitHub project

plugins.name: replatform-to-infrapad
plugins.description: Replatform an existing application onto the Infrapad framework (Go + Connect-RPC + buf + Bazel + Goose + gateway, Vite/React SPA)
